trigger: First time the player encounters Vorax units

lines.speaker: Synapse-Brain
lines.text: You are already absorbed. You simply have not accepted it yet.

lines.speaker: Synapse-Brain
lines.text: Every civilization believes resistance is a strategy. The first seventeen we encountered believed this also.

trigger: When Vorax controls 30% of the map

lines.speaker: Synapse-Brain
lines.text: The galaxy does not belong to builders. It belongs to what consumes them.

lines.speaker: Synapse-Brain
lines.text: We have eaten older things than you. We have eaten things that had names for us. They did not survive long enough to teach those names to anyone.

trigger: Player repels a Vorax planetary invasion

lines.speaker: Synapse-Brain
lines.text: Every faction we have faced has a word for us. Monster. Plague. End. We prefer: inevitable.

lines.speaker: Synapse-Brain
lines.text: You have survived this wave. There are seventeen more behind it. We are not attacking you. We are digesting you. Slowly.

trigger: Approaching endgame with Vorax as primary threat

lines.speaker: Synapse-Brain
lines.text: You will not stop the Devouring. You will only delay when it reaches your core. But delay is interesting. Delay means more material to consume when it ends.
